title: montia fontana subsp. chondrosperma
intro: Montia fontana subsp. chondrosperma, also known as bog miner's lettuce or water miner's lettuce, is a plant species belonging to the family Montiaceae. It is a perennial herb with edible leaves that have been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Montia fontana subsp. chondrosperma include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The leaves can be consumed as a salad green, and herbal preparations include infusions and teas, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health.
